home.loader_text: IN A WORLD OF SAMENESS AND WIDESPREAD INFLUENCE, THROUGH ALL THE CLUTTER (TATC) EXISTS TO HELP PEOPLE UNCOVER WHAT MATTERS TO THEM. WE BELIEVE IN THE POWER OF INDEPENDENT THINKING-TO RESIST WHAT'S EVERYWHERE, EASY, OR EXPECTED.

a-sweet-kid.title: A Sweet Kid
a-sweet-kid.subtitle: Mexico City Art Week 2025 — Salon Silicon
body: A Sweet Kid was a multimedia installation that explored the fractured reality of living a double life. The 6' x 8' sterile padded space replicated an institutional solitary confinement cell with short film script pages lining the exterior to give visitors narrative context before entering.
Inside, they experienced a 13-minute spatial audio journey of evolving negative self-talk alongside commissioned paintings by artist Shelby Keierleber that explored fragmented identity.

This marked Iseasi's first installation and spatial audio experience, building on her previous work examining personal trauma and social masks. The environment created a space where visitors could confront their own experiences of authenticity and performance in daily life.

artist.label: THE ARTIST
artist.name: ISEEASI
artist.bio1: ISEEASI is a multimedia artist who builds worlds that encourage self-exploration and connection through shared experience. Moving deliberately away from mass consumption mindsets, she embraces authentic expression developed through thoughtful collaboration with other creatives.
artist.bio2: At the heart of her work lies a mission to reveal people to themselves at their own pace. Though her pieces often emerge from periods of isolation, they paradoxically seek to validate the shared nature of personal struggles.
